description_long: This object is a rectangular road work detour sign with a black background and a series of large, white, pixelated chevron arrows pointing in one direction. The sign is supported by two vertical posts that extend above and below the sign, likely made of metal for stability. The chevrons are arranged in a row, providing clear directional guidance for drivers or pedestrians. The sign is double-sided, with arrows on each side pointing in opposite directions, allowing for flexible placement depending on traffic flow. The surface appears matte and hard, suitable for outdoor use and visibility in various lighting conditions. There are no visible barriers or additional safety devices attached to or surrounding the sign.
description: A double-sided black road work detour sign with bold, white chevron arrows and two vertical support posts. The arrows are pixelated and highly visible, designed for clear directional guidance.
description_view_0: Front view showing three white chevron arrows pointing right on a black rectangular sign with two vertical posts.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the thin profile of the sign and the posts, with no visible arrows.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying three white chevron arrows pointing left, mirroring the front, with the same black background and posts.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the slim edge of the sign and posts, similar to view 1.
